subject: Fix vendor mode comparison graphs and reorganize documentation
body:
## Changes Made:

### 1. Fixed Vendor Mode Comparison Charts (Primary Issue)
- Added 'checked' attribute to "Compare multiple models" checkbox in index.html
- Users can now select and compare multiple models by default in vendor mode
- Enables comparison graphs, universal metrics, race charts, and comparison tables out of the box
- Users can still uncheck the box to focus on a single model

### 2. Documentation Reorganization
- Extracted comprehensive development history from claude.md into new HISTORY.md file
- Updated claude.md to reference HISTORY.md with summary of most recent changes
- Updated README.md changelog with vendor mode fix and HISTORY.md reference
- Added detailed documentation of the vendor mode fix in HISTORY.md

## Impact:
- Improves default UX by enabling multi-model comparison immediately
- Reduces cognitive load - users don't need to discover the checkbox toggle
- Maintains flexibility for users who want single-model focus
- Cleaner claude.md file with history properly separated
- Better documentation organization for future maintenance

## Files Modified:
- index.html (1 line: added checked attribute)
- HISTORY.md (new file: 265 lines of extracted history)
- claude.md (reduced ~250 lines, added history reference)
- README.md (added changelog entry and HISTORY.md reference)
title: Fix vendor mode comparison graphs and reorganize documentation
